NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: Progression-free survival (PFS) by blinded independent central review
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=4 HER2+ MBC PFS Phase-3 trials. v1.2 tree geometry: T_DXd links T_DM1 (DESTINY-Breast03) and TPC_Hplus_chemo (DESTINY-Breast02); T_DM1 links LapaCape (EMILIA) and TPC_chemo (TH3RESA). 5 treatment nodes, 4 direct edges, 0 closed loops. Consistency testing not defined (accepted trade-off); transitivity assumption restored.

title: RapidMeta Oncology | ADC NMA in HER2+ MBC 2L+ PFS v1.2 (split-TPC, transitivity-restored tree)
